parameter.name: ip_version
parameter.description:
Controls which IP version family Himmelblau should use for outbound network connections.
Supported values are: .RS .IP \(bu 2 ipv4-only \(em use only IPv4 sockets .IP \(bu 2 ipv6-only \(em use only IPv6 sockets .IP \(bu 2 both \(em allow both IPv4 and IPv6 (default) .RE
